explanation: Dove presented more consistent, verifiable evidence (e.g., JCPOA's 90% enrichment reduction) and addressed counterarguments effectively. Hawk's logic relied on contested historical analogies (Syria's post-strike enrichment) and weaker evidence for military strikes' efficacy. Dove's clarity and persuasiveness were stronger, emphasizing diplomacy's verifiable track record against Hawk's repetitive, less substantiated claims.

factcheck_flags.claim: Syria’s reactor was destroyed, and no evidence shows Syria resumed enrichment post-strike
factcheck_flags.issue: IAEA reports confirm Syria enriched uranium for civil use post-2007, contradicting this claim
Iraq Survey Group found no WMDs, undermining this assertion

factcheck_flags.claim: North Korea’s 2018 talks froze nuclear tests
factcheck_flags.issue: North Korea continued missile testing post-2018, limiting this claim’s accuracy
